## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::PhilippinePeso;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        PhilippinePeso { size: 20, stroke: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
currency, peso, money, php

## Categories
finance
